clientId.title: EUIPO Client ID
clientId.description: Your EUIPO developer portal Client ID. Register for free at https://dev.euipo.europa.eu/ — used only to obtain an OAuth2 access token.

clientSecret.title: EUIPO Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Your EUIPO developer portal Client Secret. Register for free at https://dev.euipo.europa.eu/ — used only to obtain an OAuth2 access token.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Brand keywords to search for. All keywords are combined into a single RSQL OR query so multi-word terms with spaces are supported. Each value is automatically wrapped as *keyword* if no * is present.

dateFrom.title: Filing date from
dateFrom.description: Optional lower bound for the trademark application date (YYYY-MM-DD). Results include trademarks filed on or after this date.

dateTo.title: Filing date to
dateTo.description: Optional upper bound for the trademark application date (YYYY-MM-DD). Results include trademarks filed on or before this date.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of trademark records to emit. The EUIPO API returns pages of 100; the actor paginates until this limit is reached.

niceClass.title: Nice class filter
niceClass.description: Optional Nice Classification filter. Use a single class number (e.g. 9) or comma-separated values for multiple classes (e.g. 9,42). Leave empty to return all classes.

status.title: Trademark status filter
status.description: Optional trademark status filter. Leave empty to return all statuses.

markFeature.title: Mark type filter
markFeature.description: Optional mark type filter. Leave empty to return all mark types.

useSandbox.title: Use sandbox environment
useSandbox.description: When enabled, all requests go to the EUIPO sandbox environment, which uses test data rather than live production records. Useful while waiting for production API approval.
